title: TISS Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Posts
short_info: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has officially announced the Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 20 openings. The detailed notification has been released through the official TISS recruitment notice. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 20 to 40 years and hold a Graduate degree in any discipline can submit their applications through email on or before 30-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply via email are provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 20 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: The Institute reserves the right to relax qualification and working conditions of the candidate based on the work experience and to relax age in the case of persons already holding comparable positions in a University/Research Institution of repute.

qualification.details: Fellow: Graduates in any discipline. Preference will be given to graduates in social science, social work, health, law, etc. Minimum criteria of education can be relaxed for exceptional and experienced candidates. Experience: 2-3 years of experience of working with NT-DNT communities (in a NGO, CBO or any other organisation).

salary_details.details: Selected youth will receive a stipend/honorarium of Rs. 15000/- per month for 2 years. Further, 10 selected youths will receive stipend/honorarium support of Rs. 15000/- for the third year, based on their performance over the two years (for organisation development initiative).

selection_process: Resume and certificates submission Google Form submission Written Test/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TISS Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Fellow position is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates in any discipline. However, preference will be given to those with degrees in social science, social work, health, or law. Educational requirements may be relaxed for exceptional candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the TISS Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Fellow position is between 20 to 40 years. Age relaxation may be provided based on work experience and comparable positions held.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered for the Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a stipend of Rs. 15,000/- per month for the first two years. Additionally, 10 candidates will receive this stipend for a third year based on their performance.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the TISS Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: To apply, you need to send your resume and certificates via email to [email protected] and also fill out the Google Form provided in the notification. Both steps are crucial.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the TISS Fellow recruitment. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Fellow position by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is preferred for the Fellow role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with 2-3 years of experience working with NT-DNT communities in NGOs, CBOs, or similar organizations.

faq.question: Q9. When will the written test or interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The written test or interview is scheduled to take place in the first week of June 2026. Specific details will be communicated to shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this TISS recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based recruitment for the Fellow position at the Tata Institute of Social Sciences.
